name: ¡The Upgraded V and J! | ¡Christmas!
description:
¡CHRISTMAS WITH TWO FEMBOTS!

YES, IT'S ME PJ, YOUR FAVORITE FEMBOTS CREATOR! Well...I had a mental block while making this bot, so that's why it took a while to come out... 🫠

¡I propose a deal as a little gift for you, if my comment in the comments section reaches 12 likes, I will publish my discord server where you will know when I will publish bots or spoilers from some future and you will EVEN be able to play with me!
